  "order": [],
  "workable": [],
  "findings": [
    "Missing load reactor on long motor leads causing high dV/dt voltage spikes",
    "Accelerated degradation of motor winding insulation (corona discharge)",
    "Potential for premature motor failure and VFD overcurrent trips"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Install an appropriately rated output dV/dt filter or load reactor near the VFD",
    "Megger test the motor windings to assess current insulation degradation",
    "Verify VFD carrier frequency is set according to manufacturer recommendations for long lead lengths"
  ],
  "rationale": "Operating a VFD with long motor leads and no load reactor or dV/dt filter subjects the motor windings to severe voltage spikes due to reflected wave phenomena. This rapidly degrades the motor's insulation system, leading to premature winding failure and potential VFD damage.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 430",
    "NEMA MG 1 Part 31",
    "VFD Manufacturer Installation Manuals"
  ]
}
